refinement_sections.content: I need to sort a large dataset of customer records. This means organizing the records in a certain order. I also have to think about how people will search for these records by name, email, and phone number.

The algorithm should be efficient, which probably means it needs to be fast. I also need to worry about memory usage, so it shouldn't use too much space. Plus, it should handle many updates at once without breaking.
The dataset is large, so I need to consider how that affects sorting. I might need to find a balance between speed and memory use. There might also be rules about how I can store the data.
I want to create a sorting algorithm that is quick and uses little memory. I also want it to work well when people are searching for records and when there are many updates happening.
I should learn about different sorting algorithms and how they work. I might also need to look into data structures that help with searching and updating records.
